# Support

Use GitHub Discussions for usage questions. Use an issue for a reproducible core, Codex component, or Pi component defect.

Include `ctxnorm --version`, `ctxnorm doctor`, operating system, Python version, component version, client version, exact redacted command, and minimal redacted diagnostics. Never attach credentials, sessions, private prompts, personal vocabulary, private paths, or workspace content.

Use the private process in [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for vulnerabilities.
